description: Create a technical control schematic for a hospital Air Handling Unit (AHU-1) using Diagrams.net (draw.io) based on the requirements in ~/Desktop/AHU_Sequence_of_Operations.txt. The schematic must illustrate the airflow path (Mixing -> Filter -> Heating -> Cooling -> Fan) and include all specified sensors and control devices with their exact tags (e.g., 'SF-1', 'SAT', 'VFD-1'). Use SOLID lines for physical connections and DASHED lines for logical control connections. Save the source file to ~/Diagrams/AHU-1_Schematic.drawio and export a PDF version to ~/Diagrams/AHU-1_Schematic.pdf.
